results.rendered_html: saṃtamasa (von sam + tamas) n.  P. 5,4,79 .  VOP. 6,79 . allgemeine Finsterniss, Finsterniss überh.  AK. 1,2,1,4 .  H. 146 .  HALĀY. 1,110 . prātarbibheda viśvasya karaiḥ saṃtamasaṃ raviḥ  KATHĀS. 87,18 . 93,13 .  LA. (III) 86,14  (pl.).  SARVADARŚANAS. 48,8 . sāndratama˚  ŚIŚ. 9,22 . rajaḥ˚ durch Staub bewirkt  BHAṬṬ. 5,2 . vighnaugha˚ Inschr. in  Journ. of the Am. Or.
